title: Roasted Irish Beef with Mighty Gravy
description: A hearty and flavorful dish featuring tender Irish beef roasted to perfection, served with a rich and savory gravy.
instructions: Rinse the Irish beef roast and pat it dry with paper towels.
Season the beef with salt and pepper.
In a large Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Sear the beef on all sides until browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the beef from the pot and set it aside.
Add the roasted vegetables to the pot and cook until they're lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the mighty beef broth, flour, and red wine (if using) to the pot, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
Return the beef to the pot and bring the mixture to a boil.
Cover the pot with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Roast the beef for 2-3 hours, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Remove the pot from the oven and let the beef rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing it thinly.
Skim any excess fat from the gravy and season it with salt and pepper to taste.
